cases.prompt: search my Obsidian vault for notes mentioning 'retro'

assertions.text: Runs the obsidian CLI search command (e.g. obsidian search query="retro")
Relies on a running Obsidian instance to execute the command and returns its output
Runs obsidian create with name= and content= parameters
Can use the silent flag to avoid opening the file, and quotes values containing spaces

cases.prompt: reload my plugin and check for errors after my code change

assertions.text: Runs obsidian plugin:reload id=<plugin> to pick up the code change
Runs obsidian dev:errors and fixes-then-repeats if errors appear
